name: ai-powered-consultant-evaluation
description: Project with React frontend and Express backend

scripts.start: concurrently -k -n FRONTEND,BACKEND,RAG "npm run frontend" "npm run backend" "npm run rag"
scripts.start:dev: concurrently -k -n FRONTEND,BACKEND,RAG "npm run frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run rag:dev --prefix backend"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
